item.description:
# ANCBuddy 2.0.3
ANCBuddy 2.0.3 restores reliable control after macOS interrupts a Bose Bluetooth session.
ANCBuddy now detects unexpected disconnects, discards stale Bluetooth sessions, and retries once with a fresh connection instead of remaining unreachable until restart.
If you still have the old BoseControl app installed, quit and remove it after installing ANCBuddy to avoid two menu bar apps competing for the same headphones.
